Install Foundry (if not installed)   curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && foundryup   # 2. Set environment variables   export PRIVATE_KEY=<your-deployer-private-key>   export ARBITER_ADDRESS=<arbiter-address-for-dispute-resolution>   export BASE_RPC_URL=https://mainnet.base.org   # 3. Deploy (dry run first)   forge script script/DeployEscrow.s.sol:DeployEscrow \\       --rpc-url $BASE_RPC_URL \\       --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY \\       --broadcast \\       --verify \\       --etherscan-api-key <basescan-api-key>   # 4. After deployment, update CONFIG in js/config.js:   #    ESCROW_REGISTRY: \"<deployed-address>\" Existing deployed contracts (Base Mainnet):   Soul Contract:
